arts.sum: Manchester United, Tottenham, Rangers and Chelsea are all in action on Thursday in European quarter-finals.

arts.sum: Manchester United take on Lyon in the Europa League on Wednesday night hoping to win a place in the competition's semi-final to salvage something from Ruben Amorim's first months in charge

arts.ttl: Amorim: Onana will play against Lyon
arts.sum: Andre Onana will be recalled for Manchester United's UEFA Europa League quarter-final second leg against Lyon, Ruben Amorim has confirmed. "When I made that decision I talked with Andre and that is important for me to explain to the player to understand what I am thinking.

arts.ttl: Senior INEOS official steps down from Man Utd board for new role
arts.sum: Manchester United have terminated senior INEOS official Jean-Claude Blanc as a director, instead confirming a new role for one of Sir Jim Ratcliffe's closest aides.

arts.ttl: Man United star now has seven games to save Old Trafford career amid Ruben Amorim transfer 'plan'
arts.sum: Manchester United are in for a huge summer of change if Ruben Amorim and Ineos have their way in the transfer window

arts.ttl: Joshua Zirkzee supported by three Man United teammates after huge Ruben Amorim injury news
